name: Payrix
description: Payrix — US payment facilitation platform for SaaS companies embedding payments with full PayFac infrastructure and risk management.

seo.title: Payrix — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Payrix: Payrix — US payment facilitation platform for SaaS companies embedding payments with full PayFac infrastructure and risk management.

when_to_use: Embedding full PayFac infrastructure into US vertical SaaS
Merchant onboarding with risk management for software platforms
Card processing and ACH for SaaS platforms without PayFac overhead

cons: Legacy feel in portions of dashboard
review.verdict: Serious PayFac-in-a-box for US vertical SaaS, but complexity and sales cycle are not for small teams.
review.best_for: US vertical SaaS platforms becoming full payment facilitators at scale
review.not_for: Small teams or non-US platforms wanting quick embedded-payments launch
